ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_year" TEXT /* The year or range of years for the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., regular, special) */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number for each session */,
  "presiding_officer" TEXT /* Who presided over the session */,
  "legislative_body" TEXT /* Legislative body (e.g., House, Senate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., Representative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "office_level" TEXT /* Level of the office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., executive, legislative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_level" TEXT /* Level of the position (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of position (e.g., leadership, committee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "boundary_map_url" TEXT /* URL to the district boundary map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date when the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "representative_name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the representative */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the representative */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the representative */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_sessions" (
  "representative_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the representative */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session is current */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, resigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_sessions_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_sessions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_sessions_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_sessions_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_districts" (
  "representative_district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the representative */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of representation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of representation */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the representation is current */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the representation (e.g., active, resigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_districts_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_districts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_parties" (
  "representative_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the party affiliation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the party affiliation */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the party affiliation is current */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the party affiliation (e.g., active, resigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_parties_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_positions" (
  "representative_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the representative */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of holding the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of holding the position */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the position is current */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the position (e.g., active, resigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_positions_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_positions_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_office_history" (
  "representative_office_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office history record */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the representative */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of holding the office */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of holding the office */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the office is currently held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the office (e.g., active, resigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_office_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_office_history_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representative_office_history_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)
